caption: A video screen capture shows a split-screen layout featuring a website for "JASPY'S CASEBREAKS.COM" on the left and a video feed on the right. The website displays a product page for "2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBALL HOBBY CASE BREAK #1 *RANDOM HIT*" priced at "$489.99," with a red "SOLD OUT" button. The video feed alternates between a top view of a table with trading card boxes and a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. In the bottom right of the video feed, a red call-to-action banner instructs viewers to "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a YouTube Subscribe button. Throughout the sequence, the website content remains static while the video feed switches from showing the merchandise on the table to a talking-head shot of the man.
